message:
chore(fcp-core): regenerate CBOR test vectors with updated keys

Regenerate enrollment and simulate request CBOR test vectors to reflect
updated cryptographic key material:

- enrollment/request_vectors.cbor: signing_kid, encryption_kid, and
  issuance_kid hex values updated to match current key generation
  output (e.g. signing_kid 2288a346bcf8059f → 074546045a41da23)
- simulate/simulate_request_vectors.cbor: request_id UUIDs regenerated
  as expected from deterministic vector generation with new seeds

These are binary test fixtures regenerated by the vector generator CLI;
the schema and structure are unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
